summary: Full backend + frontend e2e tested for Cadence. 14/14 pytest backend cases pass (auth, voice samples, voice profile generate/refine/patch via Claude, drafts CRUD, SSE chat, publish targets w/ masking, publish error path, reminders + processing via Resend). Frontend flow exercised: landing -> register -> onboarding (samples + Claude profile) -> dashboard -> new draft -> SSE chat that populates draft body via <draft> block -> review with target-missing pill -> schedule reminder -> settings save + voice refine. Found and fixed one MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in /api/auth/register and /api/auth/session.

issues: Two background 401 console errors on initial page loads — appears to be /api/auth/me probes before login. Not user-facing but pollutes console; consider suppressing or skipping when no token.

action_items: Verify the two fixes in server.py (register + session_exchange now pop _id before returning user). No further action required for backend.
Optional: silence the unauthenticated /api/auth/me 401 fetched on landing/login pages (cosmetic console noise).
critical_code_review_comments: BUG (FIXED by me): /api/auth/register and /api/auth/session returned the in-place inserted Mongo doc which still contained the ObjectId `_id` field, causing a 500 ValueError in FastAPI's jsonable_encoder. Added doc.pop('_id', None) before returning.
Style: /api/voice/profile/refine builds a new LlmChat with a separate session_id each time which discards conversational context — acceptable for single-shot refinement but worth a comment.
Reliability: /api/reminders/process has no auth — by design (cron). Consider a shared secret header so it can't be invoked publicly to trigger Resend sends.
Single-file server.py is ~750 lines and packs auth, voice, drafts, chat, publish, reminders. As features grow, split into routers (good-to-have, not blocking).
test_credentials: Each run creates fresh test_<uuid>@cadence.dev / password123. Seed user test1@cadence.dev / password123 not asserted (not pre-seeded by the app).
seed_data_creation: Tests create their own users/samples/drafts/reminders and clean up the primary draft at the end. Some publish_draft + voice_profile / publish_target docs remain per test run; non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_cadence_backend.py is stable (~32s with Claude calls). The SSE chat test requires the model to actually emit a <draft> block — prompt is deterministic enough. Frontend selectors all use data-testid; auth flow uses /login with switch-to-register. The Drafts dashboard initially shows 'LOADING…' before drafts arrive — wait ~1-2s before asserting heading text.
rca_of_the_issue: REGISTER 500 RCA: `db.users.insert_one(doc)` mutates the doc to inject Mongo's `_id` ObjectId. The next line returned `{k: v for k, v in doc.items() if k != 'password_hash'}` which still contained `_id`. FastAPI's jsonable_encoder cannot serialize ObjectId -> 500 with `TypeError: 'ObjectId' object is not iterable`. Same pattern in /api/auth/session. Fix: pop `_id` (and `password_hash`) before returning. Reproducible by POST /api/auth/register with any valid payload pre-fix.
